## Outcome

Describe the user-visible result and the boundary changed.

## Verification

List focused checks and the complete check result. Include a regression test for behavior changes.

## Compatibility and risk

Call out public API, CLI, configuration, storage, provider, extension, platform, security, or migration impact. State `None` when there is none.

## Release note

Link the matching `CHANGELOG.md` entry, or explain why the change is not release-visible.
